title: Thai family mourns teen girl found dead in suitcase as Australian arrested
abstract: Can you believe it? A Thai family is mourning the discovery of a teenage girl's body in a suitcase, with an Australian arrested. Quite the bizarre case!
abstract_zh: 你听说没？泰国家庭正为袋子里发现的少女尸体悲痛欲绝，而澳洲人已经被抓了。这事儿可真是够离奇的！
